title: rockhausenia cochlearis
intro: Rockhausenia cochlearis, also known as the cochlearis plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rockhausenia cochlearis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and even aid in pain management. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for easy consumption, and can be found in some natural health stores or online.
